{{Quote|Silence, Hutar, you withered old nuna! You're the royal advisor! That means you're only to advise when I ask for it!|[[R'cardo Sooflie IX]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 15" />}}
'''Hutar Zash''' was royal advisor to the [[Lannik High Court]] under Prince [[R'cardo Sooflie IX]].

==Biography==
Zash had been in his post as military advisor for many years, serving also under Sooflie's father, the former King. Though he was an old friend of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]], during the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] peace-talks on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], Zash participated in an Iaro-led assassination attempt on the lives of their Jedi councilors. During a night-time [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] ride, he attempted to kill a number of Jedi Masters, including [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and Even Piell, with [[Thermite bomb/Legends|thermite bombs]] strapped to his chest. The plot failed when Piell sliced the air taxi in two with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], separating the Jedi from the terrorists moments before the bombs exploded, killing Zash and his accomplice.

Piell reflected sadly that Prince Sooflie must have been a bad monarch indeed, to have made a loyal soldier like Zash turn against the royal family.
